mapper.insert: INSERT INTO short_link_visit_log( short_code, ip, user_agent, referer )VALUES( #{shortCode}, #{ip}, #{userAgent}, #{referer} )
mapper.select: SELECT id, short_code as shortCode, ip, user_agent as userAgent, referer, create_time as createTime FROM short_link_visit_log WHERE short_code=#{shortCode} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT count(*) FROM short_link_visit_log WHERE short_code=#{shortCode} AND create_time >= CURDATE() AND create_time < DATE_ADD(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
